title: xanthocephalum gymnospermoides subsp. eradiatum
intro: Xanthocephalum gymnospermoides subsp. eradiatum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the 'prickly goldenbrush'. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum gymnospermoides subsp. eradiatum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating wounds and infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
